title: Terramity Experimental Items
description: Adds crafting recipes for Terramity's Chronoseraph Clock, and Pocket Universe.
body:
This is a relatively simple mod, that only adds two new crafting recipes to add on to the Terramity mod.

# Crafting Recipes

### Chronoseraph Clock

Can be crafted with a clock, two opaline moonstone, two prismatic jewels, and two cracked microcosms.

### Pocket Universe

Can be crafted with four antiprisms, a cracked microcosm, nyxium, reverium, void alloy, and exodium.


This mod is an addon for the Terramity Mod, which can be found [here].(https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity)

Have a great day!
